source_old_req: The acc_process component shall enforce that each of the output data ports acc1_output, acc2_output, acc3_output, acc4_output, acc5_output, and acc6_output consistently reflect the data transmission relationships defined by the implementation layer acc_process.impl. The implementation layer shall ensure that incoming event data port signals acc1_event_in through acc6_event_in are correctly routed to their respective internal threads acc1 through acc6, and that the resulting data from each thread is accurately forwarded to the corresponding output data port. The process shall maintain data consistency between the internal thread outputs and the externally exposed output data ports, ensuring no incorrect forwarding of input events occurs within the process boundaries.
natural_requirement: The acc_process component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for acc_process.impl. In the implementation layer, acc_process.impl shall route control signal from acc1_event_in to acc1.acc1_command_in through C1 and control signal from acc2_event_in to acc2.acc2_command_in through C2.

requirement_items.text: The acc_process.impl implementation shall route the control signal from acc1_event_in to acc1.acc1_command_in through connection C1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The acc_process.impl implementation shall declare connection C1 from acc1_event_in to acc1.acc1_command_in.

requirement_items.text: The acc_process.impl implementation shall route the control signal from acc2_event_in to acc2.acc2_command_in through connection C2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The acc_process.impl implementation shall declare connection C2 from acc2_event_in to acc2.acc2_command_in.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The acc_process.impl implementation shall declare connection C1 from acc1_event_in to acc1.acc1_command_in. The acc_process.impl implementation shall declare connection C2 from acc2_event_in to acc2.acc2_command_in.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The acc_process.impl implementation shall route the control signal from acc1_event_in to acc1.acc1_command_in through connection C1. The acc_process.impl implementation shall route the control signal from acc2_event_in to acc2.acc2_command_in through connection C2.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
